name: What if my chemical exposure claim at work gets denied?
description: Appeal quickly with added evidence; get lawyer for hearing[2].

mainEntity.name: What if my chemical exposure claim at work gets denied?

acceptedAnswer.text: Appeal quickly with added evidence; get lawyer for hearing[2].
acceptedAnswer.description: **Appeal within state deadlines (e.g., 20 days in Utah) with more evidence or attorney.** Denials often cite lack of causation or timely filing[2]. **Key factors:** New medical opinions, exposure proof via air filters[2]; OSHA complaints strengthen. **Practical guidance:** Gather overlooked docs, file administrative appeal, consider third-party claim. Don't accept denial quietly. **Appeals succeed with better proof.**
